long_signal_definition: (close > ema8) AND (slope > 0) AND (dist_atr <= pullback_atr) AND (impulse_atr[1] >= impulse_atr_param)
entry_rule: enter at NEXT bar open after the signal bar closes
stop_rule: lowest low of last 3 bars at signal bar
exit_rule: TRAILING: when bar close < ema8, exit at next bar open; hard stop if low <= stop_price; force-exit after max_hold_bars. NOTE: this exit-trail variant does NOT use a fixed 2R target.
no_repaint: true under engine assumptions: signal evaluated on CLOSED bar i, executed at open of bar i+1; no intrabar/tick dependency for signal; stop/exit checked intrabar on subsequent bars only
no_lookahead: true: all inputs use values at or before the signal bar; impulse uses [1] shift
trailing_logic: Trailing Exit (QL_ALPHA_LINK_8EMA_1H) > Source: QL Alpha pipeline, promoted to parity
known_strengths: Deterministic Spec — LINK 8EMA Pullback + Trailing Exit (QL_ALPHA_LINK_8EMA_1H)
known_weaknesses: PROMOTED TO PARITY. Parity Pine: `LINK_8EMA_REVIEW.pine`. Not approved for live trading.
